route.name: Olympic Bridges Overnighter
route.description: Public GPX low-elevation forest overnighter with gravel roads, bridges, shade, and swim/water access.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX low-elevation forest overnighter with gravel roads, bridges, shade, and swim/water access.
route.bestSeason: Summer and fall; July is a strong low-elevation fit if road and campground conditions are clear.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX low-elevation forest overnighter with gravel roads, bridges, shade, and swim/water access.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Potable water at Brown Creek in open season plus many filter sources.
resources.food: No food resupply on route; carry meals.
resources.camping: Brown Creek Campground, West Lake dispersed options, and Olympic NF dispersed camping need current availability confirmation.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before ride-ready promotion.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: One of the strongest July 2-day candidates.
Keep it as a lower-heat fallback.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control ride-ready promotion.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

review.decision: reject/rework for ride_ready; Brown Creek is FCFS and Lake Cushman/Bear Gulch closure must be overlaid against GPX
blockers: Not ride-ready until date-specific camp/permit, water, legal access, closures, fire/smoke, and weather are refreshed.

Active official Lake Cushman/Bear Gulch closure may intersect the route corridor; cannot promote until GPX is overlaid against the closure map/order and affected roads/trails are ruled out or rerouted.
Brown Creek is FCFS; no exact July 11 availability can be proven in advance.
Final fire/smoke/weather refresh for July 10-13 cannot be completed on July 2 with ride-ready certainty.
Stage 1 fire restrictions constrain campfires and stoves; dispersed campfire assumptions are not valid.
requiredFixes: Complete July 9-10 final refresh for next-weekend ride readiness.
Overlay imported GPX against Olympic NF Bear Gulch/Lake Cushman closure Exhibit A and active road orders, especially FS-24, FS-2451, FS-2160, FS-29, and Lake Cushman access segments.
Check Olympic NF/Quilcene Office on July 9-10 for Brown Creek water/system status, road access, and any campground alerts.
Set backup legal lodging/camp option if Brown Creek FCFS is full.
Refresh Olympic NF alerts, fire restrictions, fire danger, AirNow/smoke, and NWS point forecast within 24-48 hours of departure.
openQuestions: Do current closures/fire/weather alter the imported GPX?

promotionChecklist.targetWindowNote: Strong low-elevation July overnighter if Brown Creek/USFS camping and road conditions are current.
promotionChecklist.officialGeometryNote: Official/public GPX has been imported and parsed locally.
promotionChecklist.campingPermitsNote: Brown Creek Campground is officially open May-September and FCFS with 20 sites; exact July 11 availability cannot be guaranteed because there are no reservations.
promotionChecklist.closuresFireWeatherNote: Olympic NF Stage 1 Fire Restrictions are effective June 26-Sept 30, 2026 unless rescinded, with Moderate fire danger and an active Lake Cushman area closure post Bear Gulch Fire through Oct 1, 2026.
promotionChecklist.legalAccessNote: Active Lake Cushman/Bear Gulch closure is posted and the GPX includes a Lake Cushman waypoint/area; must overlay GPX against closure Exhibit A and current road orders.

days.name: Olympic Bridges Overnighter segment 1
days.camp: Brown Creek Campground, West Lake dispersed options, and Olympic NF dispersed camping need current availability confirmation.

logistics: Final ride-ready status requires live date-specific resource and legal checks.
